item.title: She Walked Home From A Friend's House And Vanished
item.description: Lindsey Baum was 10 years old when she disappeared while walking home in Washington state in 2009. Years later, her remains were found miles away, but investigators are still searching for answers about what happened to her.

media:content.media:title: She Walked Home From A Friend's House And Vanished
media:content.media:description: Lindsey Baum was 10 years old when she disappeared while walking home in Washington state in 2009. Years later, her remains were found miles away, but investigators are still searching for answers about what happened to her.

item.title: A Beautiful Mansion Has Been Hiding A Dark Secret For Decades
item.description: The Los Feliz Murder Mansion became the subject of endless fascination after a shocking family tragedy unfolded inside the home in 1959. Decades later, the abandoned property continues to fuel speculation, urban legends, and questions about what really happened behind its doors.

media:content.media:title: A Beautiful Mansion Has Been Hiding A Dark Secret For Decades
media:content.media:description: The Los Feliz Murder Mansion became the subject of endless fascination after a shocking family tragedy unfolded inside the home in 1959. Decades later, the abandoned property continues to fuel speculation, urban legends, and questions about what really happened behind its doors.
